Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows marked renal dysfunction (elevated creatinine, significant proteinuria, high urine microalbumin/creatinine ratio), hypoglycemia, and low HbA1c. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, protein, ketones, bilirubin) further support renal impairment and possible nephrotic syndrome. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Immediate nephrology evaluation is recommended; consider acute or chronic kidney disease and investigate causes of hypoglycemia.
